violations.text: The retail cooler located in the front area was not in good repair. The unit was observed with juices labeled "KEEP REFRIGERATED". Juices were determined to be safe at the time of inspection and moved to proper refrigeration. Cooler to not be used to store any refrigerated items until it can be serviced/repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the front cooler has an accumulation of dried milk on the shelving. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023
